name: zer0-mistakes
description: Bootstrap Jekyll theme for headless Github Pages CMS.
author: Amr Abdel-Motaleb

scripts.test:e2e:a11y: cd e2e && npx playwright test tests/accessibility.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:visual: cd e2e && npx playwright test tests/visual-regression.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:install: cd e2e && npm install && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
